title: Meteorologist

rationales.taskAutomation: AI weather models now generate routine short-range forecasts at high skill, but severe-weather warning judgment and public communication stay meteorologist-led.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI-driven numerical weather prediction (e.g., large-scale ML forecast models) is mature and increasingly used alongside traditional physics-based models.
rationales.adoption: National weather agencies and broadcast media widely use AI-assisted forecast models as one input among several.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can run ensemble forecast pipelines and flag anomalies, but issuing severe-weather warnings and communicating risk to the public require a meteorologist.

tasksGrowing: Severe-weather warning judgment and timing decisions
Novel forecast-model validation and bias correction
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 19-2021, p25-p75 rounded
insight: AI forecast models now rival traditional physics-based models on routine forecasts, but the decision to issue a tornado warning, and the words used to communicate it, still rest with a meteorologist.
